> Generated for `@gravity-ui/chartkit@6.1.2`

# ChartKit

> A data visualization suite integrated with our design system.
>
> **npm:** `@gravity-ui/chartkit` — check the installed major version in the user's `package.json` and read docs matching it.

## Install

```shell
npm install @gravity-ui/chartkit @gravity-ui/uikit
```


> Note: this package's README does not yet have a `## For AI agents` section. See the [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gravity-ui/chartkit/main/README.md) for full documentation.
